zh.lifeSummary: 當Martha Kirby於1585年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東時，她的父親John Kirby33歲，母親Joan Cranfield33歲。她於大約1606年與John Hale在英國賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Martha Kirby于1585年出生在英国英格兰賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東时，她的父亲John Kirby33岁，母亲Joan Cranfield33岁。她于大约1606年与John Hale在英国賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾華頓 亞特 史東。

nameMeanings.name: Kirby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in northern and eastern England called Kirby or Kirkby, from Old Norse kirkja ‘church’ + bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.
Irish: adopted for Ó Garmhaic ‘descendant of Cíarmhac’, a personal name meaning ‘dark son’. Compare Kerwick .
Irish: Anglicized form of Mac Geirble ‘son of Geirble’, a personal name of uncertain origin. The name is preserved in the townland name of Carrowkeribly in County Mayo.

variants.name: Kerwick
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Garmhaic, more commonly Anglicized as Kirby .

nameMeanings.name: Martha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

en.lifeSummary: When Martha Kirby was born in 1585, in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Kirby, was 33 and her mother, Joan Cranfield, was 33. She married John Hale about 1606, in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She was buried in Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé John Hale environ 1606, à Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elleenterrée à Watton at Stone, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Watton-at-Stone, Hertfordshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤
ko.Watton-at-Stone, Hertfordshire, England,: 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤
ko.lifeSummary: Martha Kirby(이)가 1585년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Kirby(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Cranfield(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 대략 1606년 영국 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤에서 John Hale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 왓튼 앳 스톤에 묻혔다.

ru.Watton-at-Stone, Hertfordshire, England,: ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Martha Kirby родилась в 1585 г. в местности ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Kirby было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Cranfield, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Hale около 1606 г. в местности ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она была похоронена в местности ваттон ат стоун, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
